title: Lead Investment Banker at Acuite Ratings

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Acuite Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
